target:
…It's been two years since we left the island.
I thought I'd grown up a bit…

But I'm still completely powerless…
I wasn't there when it really mattered…

Idiot!
It's not your fault Ushio died!

Get it together, Shinpei!!
What needs protecting now is Mio-chan!
You're her older brother, after all!

If you're unreliable…
I'll take care of Mio-chan myself.
What are you two talking about?!

If it's about breasts and butt…
Which do you prefer?!

No no no!
It's not like that! He's…

Because Shinpei-san, yesterday…
You peeked into Mio's bath, right?!

N-no… wait!
It's not like I peeked…!

…Well…
It ended up being a peek.

What's going on?
That's a suspicious reaction.

By the way…
I've always wanted to ask you something, Shinpei-san.
What do you think about Mio?
W-wait! What are you asking, Tokiko?!
Of course I care about her.

Hey!
You too, Tokiko!!
Stop asking weird stuff!!

I just got a call from Dad.
After the fireworks and the Sea Send-off ceremony, the Karikiri guy's body will be empty!

(That shouldn't be…
I think it's a mistake, but…)

Shouldn't you be going inside the shrine grounds?
You can see the fireworks better from there.

Sou!!
I'm counting on you for Mio!!
